hero.title: Your neighbourhood, better connected.
hero.subtitle: Exchange services, join events, chat with your neighbours and bring your neighbourhood to life — safely, between residents.

mfa.title: Enhanced security
mfa.desc: Two-factor authentication (MFA) on every sensitive action.

payments.title: Protected payments
payments.desc: Secure transactions via Stripe, no banking data stored.

rgpd.title: Your data, your rules
rgpd.desc: GDPR-compliant: export, rectify and delete at any time.

local.title: 100% between neighbours
local.desc: A local, verified community at the scale of your neighbourhood.

features.title: Everything you need to grow your neighbourhood
features.subtitle: One app for mutual help, meeting people and local life.

services.title: Neighbour services
services.desc: Offer or request a hand: DIY, childcare, lessons, tool lending… Full tracking from request to payment.

events.title: Events & activities
events.desc: Create and join neighbourhood events, with sign-ups, waiting list and tickets.

messaging.title: Secure messaging
messaging.desc: Chat privately or in groups: text, photos, voice messages and calls, in real time.

documents.title: Documents & signatures
documents.desc: Contracts and receipts generated automatically, signed electronically and tamper-proof.

polls.title: Neighbourhood polls
polls.desc: Ask residents and decide together with real-time votes.

neighbourhood.title: My neighbourhood
neighbourhood.desc: Join your neighbourhood on the map and find all the activity near you.

steps.title: How it works
steps.subtitle: Three steps to join your community.

one.title: I create my account
one.desc: Fast, secure sign-up with two-factor authentication.

two.title: I choose my neighbourhood
two.desc: Use geolocation or search your address to join the right neighbourhood.

three.title: I connect with my neighbours
three.desc: Services, events, messages: neighbourhood life begins.

values.title: A community you can trust
values.subtitle: Nabor Services brings residents together around simple values.

proximity.title: Proximity
proximity.desc: Human-scale exchanges, between neighbours of the same area.

trust.title: Trust
trust.desc: Verified accounts, secure actions and active moderation.

solidarity.title: Solidarity
solidarity.desc: Helping out becomes simple, useful and rewarding.

final_cta.title: Ready to join your neighbourhood?
final_cta.subtitle: Create your account in minutes and meet your neighbours.
